title: FlameFrags PVP pack
description: The settings of popular pvp youtuber FlameFrags
body:
## Optimized for PVP and Content Creation
This modpack mimics the **settings** of FlameFrags making you better at pvp.\
From his **hotkeys** and video settings to recording options and crosshair this modpack has everything he does.\
This is the **perfect** modpack for becoming the next big SMP youtuber.


### Feature list
- 🍖 Saturation overview

- ➕ Crosshair Indicator

- 🛡️ Armor Hud

- 🧱 Litematica

- 🏃‍♂️ Performance optimizations

- 📷 Replay Mod

- 🔊 Voice Chat

- 🔎 Zoom

### Gameplay examples
![Playing mace pvp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccbac67b00ff9dc0686d02dbe7d5a81563905e23.png)

![Comboing a player in the smp pvp kit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13ae86750450a27b964edb3f1fa95c2672bfc614.png)



**To clarify: no, FlameFrags didn't make this client, it's a replica made from videos about his settings.**
